revision.comment: -metadata, intended for another purpose; the fix template series as a whole is metadata
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Izno|en>Izno]]
1 revision imported: Fixing my edit mistake that put this category on numerous templates it did not belong on
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Disputed-inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute#Disputed statement|Wikipedia:Disputed statement}} | text = disputed | title = This claim has reliable sources with contradicting facts | post-text = {{#if:{{{for|}}}|(for: {{{for|}}}) |}} – {{#if:{{{talk|}}}{{{talkpage|}}}{{{discuss|}}}{{{discussion|}}}|[[{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{talk|{{{talkpage|{{{discuss|{{{discussion}}}}}}}}}}}}#{{{1}}}|{{{talk|{{{talkpage|{{{discuss|{{{discussion}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|discuss]]|[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}#{{{1|}}}|discuss]]}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles with disputed statements}}<!--{{Disputed-inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
[[Category:All accuracy disputes]] }}</noinclude> \n</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Disputed-inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute#Disputed statement|Wikipedia:Disputed statement}} | text = disputed | title = This claim has reliable sources with contradicting facts | post-text = {{#if:{{{for|}}}|(for: {{{for|}}}) |}} – {{#if:{{{talk|}}}{{{talkpage|}}}{{{discuss|}}}{{{discussion|}}}|[[{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{talk|{{{talkpage|{{{discuss|{{{discussion}}}}}}}}}}}}#{{{1}}}|{{{talk|{{{talkpage|{{{discuss|{{{discussion}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|discuss]]|[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}#{{{1|}}}|discuss]]}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles with disputed statements}}<!--{{Disputed-inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
[[Category:All accuracy disputes]] }}</noinclude> \n</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Disputed-inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute#Disputed statement|Wikipedia:Disputed statement}} | text = disputed | title = This claim has reliable sources with contradicting facts | post-text = {{#if:{{{for|}}}|(for: {{{for|}}}) |}} – {{#if:{{{talk|}}}{{{talkpage|}}}{{{discuss|}}}{{{discussion|}}}|[[{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{talk|{{{talkpage|{{{discuss|{{{discussion}}}}}}}}}}}}#{{{1}}}|{{{talk|{{{talkpage|{{{discuss|{{{discussion}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|discuss]]|[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}#{{{1|}}}|discuss]]}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles with disputed statements}}<!--{{Disputed-inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disputed_inline here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disputed_inline for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Disputed-inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute#Disputed statement|Wikipedia:Disputed statement}} | text = disputed | title = This claim has reliable sources with contradicting facts | post-text = {{#if:{{{for|}}}|(for: {{{for|}}}) |}} – {{#if:{{{talk|}}}{{{talkpage|}}}{{{discuss|}}}{{{discussion|}}}|[[{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{talk|{{{talkpage|{{{discuss|{{{discussion}}}}}}}}}}}}#{{{1}}}|{{{talk|{{{talkpage|{{{discuss|{{{discussion}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|discuss]]|[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}#{{{1|}}}|discuss]]}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles with disputed statements}}<!--{{Disputed-inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
[[Category:All accuracy disputes]] }}</noinclude> \n [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
